for(;it!=h.end()&&it->first==k;++it)if(n2((*Q)[it->second]-q)<=r2)return true; } return false; }};bool vhOK(const Cand&C,double r){ if(!closed(C))return false; VHash vc;vc.build(C.V,r); for(auto&p:P)if(!vc.near(p))return false;
